description: Agriculture, food, sustainability, climate and allied science careers.

careers.name: Agricultural Scientist
careers.overview: Agricultural Scientist works with food systems, natural resources, farming, environment, sustainability and climate-aware development.
careers.whyChoose: Agricultural Scientist is useful because it connects science with real-world impact in food security, sustainability and rural innovation.
careers.eligibility: Class 12 with Science is preferred for most B.Sc/B.Tech pathways; some agribusiness routes accept Commerce or Humanities.
careers.educationPath: Class 12 -> B.Sc/B.Tech/B.Voc or diploma -> Field/lab internship -> Agriculture, food or sustainability role.
careers.workEnvironment: Farms, labs, food companies, agri-tech firms, government departments, NGOs and sustainability teams.
careers.futureScope: Strong due to food security, climate adaptation, agri-tech, sustainability reporting and allied rural development.
careers.aiImpact: AI will support crop monitoring, climate modelling and precision farming while field judgement stays important.
cons: Early career may need portfolio or training
